title: cymbidium × hillii
intro: Cymbidium × hillii is a hybrid orchid plant, known for its unique and exotic beauty. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cymbidium × hillii include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Cymbidium × hillii often involve drying and infusing the plant's leaves and flowers, which can then be used to make teas, tinctures, and topical creams.
